overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from GTA V showing the character Michael walking through Los Santos at dusk. The character waits at a street corner, crosses a multi-lane intersection, and continues along a sidewalk with the downtown skyline visible in the distance as ambient lighting transitions to evening.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban street corner with multi-story parking structure

events.description: pedestrian approaches from behind and stands next to ego at the corner
ego turns right to begin crossing the street

agents.ego_description: standing at street corner waiting for traffic to clear before crossing

notable_agents.action: approaching from behind and stopping next to ego at the corner

entered.detail: large multi-level parking garage with red brick facade across the street
tall traffic signal pole at the intersection corner
painted red curb indicating no parking zone along the street edge
concrete sidewalk with visible cracks and weathering
tall street light pole with dual lamps

segments.scene_description: The character stands at a Los Santos street corner during dusk, waiting to cross. A multi-story parking structure dominates the view across the street while a pedestrian approaches and stands beside the character. The traffic light pole and red curb mark the intersection edge.

scene_state.functional_zone: wide urban intersection crosswalk with billboards

events.description: passing pedestrian walking in opposite direction crosses path in the crosswalk
steps onto concrete sidewalk on opposite side of the intersection

agents.ego_description: walking across the multi-lane crosswalk toward the opposite sidewalk

notable_agents.action: walking across crosswalk in opposite direction, passing ego

entered.detail: large commercial billboard advertising pizza with yellow and red graphics
cluster of tall skyscrapers visible in the distance against the purple dusk sky
zebra-striped pedestrian crossing lines painted on asphalt
multi-story building with commercial ground floor and balconies above

segments.scene_description: The character crosses the wide intersection, moving from the shadow of buildings into the open crosswalk. A large pizza billboard stands prominently on the right while the downtown skyline looms ahead. The character passes another pedestrian mid-crossing and reaches the opposite sidewalk.

scene_state.functional_zone: residential sidewalk with apartment buildings and palm trees

events.description: white sports car drives past on the adjacent multi-lane street
passing a pedestrian walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the sidewalk past residential buildings and palm trees with downtown visible ahead

notable_agents.action: walking in opposite direction on the sidewalk, passing ego

entered.detail: row of multi-story residential apartment buildings with balconies and varied facades
tall palm trees lining the sidewalk and grassy verge
busy multi-lane road with moderate vehicle traffic flowing alongside

segments.scene_description: Walking along the residential sidewalk, the character passes apartment buildings and palm trees while the downtown skyline grows larger in the distance. A white sports car speeds past on the adjacent street, and the character passes another pedestrian walking the opposite way.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial street with retail buildings and bus stop

events.description: city transit bus passes by on the adjacent street
street lights illuminate as dusk deepens, transitioning from natural to artificial lighting

agents.ego_description: continuing along the sidewalk as the environment transitions to evening with street lights illuminating the path

notable_agents.action: white city transit bus driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: low-rise commercial buildings with storefronts and illuminated signage
real estate sign advertising property for sale due to foreclosure
street lamp pole that becomes illuminated during the segment

segments.scene_description: The character walks past commercial buildings as evening sets in and street lights turn on. A city bus passes by on the right, and a foreclosure sign stands on the left lawn. The ambient light shifts from natural dusk to mixed artificial lighting as the character approaches the next intersection.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a Los Santos neighborhood as the natural light of dusk transitions into the artificial glow of evening. It begins at a street corner beside a red curb, where the character waits near a multi-story parking structure before stepping out from the shadows of the buildings to cross a wide intersection. As the character moves across the crosswalk, the view opens up to reveal a large pizza billboard and the looming downtown skyline in the distance. The scene then shifts to a residential sidewalk lined with palm trees and apartment buildings, where a white sports car speeds past as the skyline grows larger. Finally, the camera follows the character past commercial buildings and a foreclosure sign as street lights flicker on, shifting the ambient lighting from a deep dusk to a mixed urban glow.
